textByHash.10676da62564614cc18588063a0b29a4d3ea0d98: I beg you... slay the beast! Free me from this torment!
textByHash.4bed1e8654cfe949a8ac36d3287158c6a1d5d0f4: You have fought the good fight this day.
textByHash.a1abf162a80f01d98feaa1d556065a3b4399fa49: You have proved yourself an honourable foe.
textByHash.a57c9dca396e46f9b613329476ec5d2634ba36ff: You have defeated me in battle, and still you search for the source?
textByHash.f68812252b921f49ef1d1fb49c0806eca31cd6ab: Are you ready to have your mettle tested?
